East Crazy Inspiration Divide Land Exchange final EA review fixture.

The proposed action is on the Custer Gallatin National Forest and administered by the Bozeman Ranger
District. The project area is in the Bridger, Bangtail, and Crazy Mountains Geographic Area and
within the Crazy Mountains Backcountry Area.

The package includes a plan consistency table for the Custer Gallatin Land Management Plan. The
project decision notice identifies the selected alternative, decision basis, and plan approval
context for this land exchange, but the package text does not cite a forest-plan approval record.

The EA states that the analysis tiers to the Final Environmental Impact Statement for the 2022
Custer Gallatin Land Management Plan and incorporates that forest-plan analysis by reference. The EA
also discusses designated areas and plan allocations.

The package discusses Endangered Species Act Section 7 consultation. It includes a Biological
Assessment and Biological Opinion, and it references threatened species, endangered species, critical
habitat, incidental take, and reinitiation.
